story: Cop shot her roommate dead after sending him Snapchat photos of her holding the gun to her head: Authorities
title: Fatal Snap
script: A cop shot her roommate dead after sending him Snapchat photos. This shocking incident raises serious questions about her fitness for duty and the potential warning signs that may have been missed. Authorities are investigating the circumstances surrounding the shooting, seeking answers about the events leading up to the tragic crime. The officer's actions have sparked a thorough review of her training and mental health evaluations, leaving many to wonder what really happened. What ultimately drove her to pull the trigger?
tiktok_caption: Fatal Snap - full story on True Crime Digest, free on all podcast apps. #news #truecrime
